author: y4rr
content: Plan: (A) hub registry — add EntryKind enum (Model/Fixture) to ModelInfo, update test to skip num_parameters>0 for Fixture (and assert ==0 to enforce explicitness). Mark all 9 fixture-bundle entries as Fixture: optimizer-trajectories-v1, dataloader-batches-v1, ml-sklearn-parity-v1, training-trajectory-v1, sd-v1-5-generation-trajectory, distributions-parity-v1, tokenizer-parity-v1, serialize-parity-v1. Mark jit-trace-parity-v1 as Model (it's a real 212-param MLP with a model.safetensors). All real models (gcn-cora, smollm-135m, ppo-cartpole-v1, etc.) → Model. Issues #1171 (autograd-parity) and #1168 follow-ups not yet in registry, untouched. (B) diffusion example — RunBundle type alias is dead because the non-cuda arm uses a literal tuple. Fix by using the alias in both arms (cuda already uses it), eliminating the type_complexity site too. This is one local change; no #[allow].
